release_notes:
## What's New

- Enhanced in-app update flow with backup prompts, visible download progress, install failure recovery, and update controls in settings.
- Background update checks now respect connectivity state and app lifecycle startup paths.
- Release CI now builds Android, Windows, and web container assets from branch and version tag pushes.

## Bug Fixes

- Fixed onboarding/update-gating edge cases after update prompts and install attempts.
- Strengthened update download result handling, checksum validation, Android install permission checks, and foreground download support.
